snps.effect_template: Complement Factor H Y402H variant. Major AMD risk factor (OR ~2.5 per allele).
ARMS2/HTRA1 locus. Second major AMD risk locus with strong effect.
Complement Component 3 variant. Associated with AMD risk through complement pathway activation.
C2/CFB locus protective variant. G allele protective against AMD (OR ~0.4 per copy).
Complement Factor B protective variant. A allele reduces AMD risk (OR ~0.5 per copy).
APOE ε2 determining SNP (context variant). ε2 and ε4 both show modest protective/neutral effects in AMD (OR ~0.7 for C allele context).
LIPC hepatic lipase protective variant. T allele protective against AMD.
CETP risk variant associated with altered lipid metabolism affecting AMD susceptibility.

recommendation_template: Protect eyes from UV light, don't smoke, eat leafy greens (lutein/zeaxanthin). Regular eye exams become more important with genetic risk. AREDS supplements may help in intermediate stages.

studies.title: Complement factor H polymorphism in age-related macular degeneration
studies.finding: CFH Y402H (rs1061170 C) increases AMD risk 2.5-fold per allele

studies.title: Complement component 3 and complement factor I genetic variants and risk of age-related macular degeneration
studies.finding: C3 rs2230199 G allele increases AMD risk through complement pathway (OR ~1.7)
